name: San Diego Loan Company | San Diego Reverse Mortgage Specialists
description_short: Full-service mortgage lender in San Diego specializing in purchase loans, refinances, and reverse mortgages for borrowers at all life stages.
description_long:
San Diego Loan Company operates as a full-service mortgage lender based in San Diego, California, under the ownership and brokerage of Richard Simpao (NMLS# 397136). The company is registered with NMLS# 2577309 and maintains a 5.0 BBB rating based on 17 reviews. The company's website indicates it partners with American Advisors Group for reverse mortgage services and maintains an office at 4455 Murphy Canyon Road, Suite 100, San Diego, CA 92123.

The company offers three primary loan categories: purchase mortgages for homebuyers financing new properties, refinance mortgages for existing homeowners seeking better rates or terms, and reverse mortgages for older Americans looking to convert home equity into cash flow. Within purchase and refinance categories, they market conventional, jumbo, FHA, and VA loan products. They also provide online calculators for reverse mortgages, traditional mortgages, and refinancing scenarios to help borrowers estimate loan terms.

Key distinguishing factors include a stated commitment to guiding borrowers through the entire loan process, multilingual service capabilities (Spanish and Tagalog fluency advertised), and a dual focus on both traditional mortgage products and reverse mortgages—a specialization reflected in their business name. The reverse mortgage emphasis appears central to their marketing strategy, with dedicated landing pages and free estimate offerings for this product.

Based on available website content, the company presents standard mortgage lender services without unusual claims or distinctive innovations. The presence of a reverse mortgage partnership with American Advisors Group and emphasis on personalized guidance are presented as value propositions, though standard in the mortgage industry. No information about pricing, rates, or specific loan terms is disclosed on the website.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Offers comprehensive mortgage product range: purchase, refinance, FHA, VA, conventional, jumbo, and reverse mortgages
Free reverse mortgage estimates available online without commitment
Multiple online calculators for mortgage, refinance, and reverse mortgage scenarios
Multilingual service offerings in Spanish and Tagalog
Broker/owner Richard Simpao personally involved with stated direct oversight (NMLS# 397136)
Reverse mortgage specialization indicated in company name and marketing focus
cons: Website lacks specific interest rate, fee, or pricing information for any loan products
No details provided about loan approval timelines, processing fees, or closing costs
Limited information about qualification requirements or credit score minimums
Reverse mortgage services appear to be partnership-based with American Advisors Group rather than direct underwriting
No customer testimonials, case studies, or detailed service descriptions beyond basic product categories
best_for: San Diego homebuyers seeking purchase financing across conventional, FHA, or VA loan programs
Current homeowners interested in refinancing to lower rates or access home equity cash-out
Senior homeowners (typically 62+) exploring reverse mortgages to supplement retirement income
diagnosis: San Diego Loan Company is best suited for San Diego-area borrowers seeking traditional mortgage products (purchase or refinance) or seniors interested in reverse mortgages who want local, personalized service with multilingual support. The primary caveat is that the website provides minimal transparency on rates, fees, or qualification criteria, requiring direct contact for pricing comparisons and detailed product information.
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 4455 Murphy Canyon Rd Ste 100, San Diego, CA 92123
